mano_cua.result_summary: 播放栏在默认窗口大小下可见（fixed bottom），但播放进度条极细（约2-3px）几乎不可见，是明显的视觉渲染Bug。播放前播放栏完全缺失，仅显示底部小箭头。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The player bar IS visible in the default window size (full screen 1280x720) and in smaller window sizes (tested at half-height). The player bar is positioned as a fixed/sticky bottom element. BUGS IDENTIFIED: 1. Missing/Invisible Progress Bar: The song progress bar in the player bar is extremely thin (approximately 2-3px) and nearly invisible. 2. Player bar absent in initial state: Before any song is played, the player bar is completely absent from the page. 3. Player bar cuts off the content: The player bar sits at the very bottom edge of the viewport, leaving very little visual margin.
